# IOTA T@H Monitor

> A macOS menu bar app (Swift/AppKit) that reads the CLI log of IOTA "Train at
> Home" and shows the real queue position / state / work that the official UI does
> not display. Read-only, no networking, no runtime dependencies.

## Documentation
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): modules, flow, core/app boundary, state machine
- [Setup](docs/setup.md): prerequisites, build, tests, launch at login
- [Conventions](docs/conventions.md): style, tests, log format (contract), git
- [Decisions (ADR)](docs/decisions/): [0001 log-only, no ws](docs/decisions/0001-log-only-no-ws.md)
- [README](README.md): usage + maintainability (detailed)
- [Design spec](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-05-iota-tah-monitor-design.md)

## Agent reference
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): working rules
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): agent rules (invariants, log format = contract)
- [MEMORY.md](MEMORY.md): working memory (current state)

## Modules
- [LogReader](Sources/IOTAMonitorCore/LogReader.swift): resolution + tail of the current day's log
- [StateParser](Sources/IOTAMonitorCore/StateParser.swift): log → MinerState (tested)
- [App](App/main.swift): NSStatusItem + Preferences (SMAppService)
